document_metadata.data_discipline: All figures sourced from spreadsheet data only. No estimates or guesses.

corporate_structure.description: Post-Sears Holdings bankruptcy operating company. Credit-bid acquisition by ESL Investments (Edward Lampert) in February 2019.

tiers.name: TopCo / Holdco
tiers.role: Holds uncommitted equity commitments; source of equity infusions to Midco

tiers.name: Midco (Transform SR Holding Management LLC)
tiers.role: Central cash management entity; operates Daily Cash Forecast; holds term loans and LC facilities

key_external_relationships.ESL_Investments: ESL Note holder; controlling equity holder
key_external_relationships.Cyrus_Capital: Term loan lender (Cyrus Term Loan, $55M Term Loan)
key_external_relationships.UBS: Loan Notes A and B against property collateral
key_external_relationships.Cinch_CCHS: Cross Country Home Services — home warranty underwriter
key_external_relationships.PNC: LC collateral banking ($4.8M+ restricted cash); P-Card
key_external_relationships.Citibank: P-Card; Citi/Manteno Loan; SYW credit card partner

cash_position_history.note: Available cash excludes restricted, trapped, and unavailable cash

snapshots.note: FY25 opening position per Liquidity sheet
FY25 ending position per Liquidity sheet
Estimated from Liquidity sheet, post-April BOD

fy2026_forecast.note: FY26 deficit reduction attributable to post-March 2026 cost reductions

business_units.name: Home Services
business_units.description: In-Home Repair and warranty service business under Sears Home Services brand
risks: SC payroll cuts may impair service quality

business_units.name: KCD
business_units.description: IP licensing and wholesale distribution of iconic American appliance and tool brands
key_risks: LG lawsuit - pending settlement - could threaten brand licensing

business_units.name: Retail B&M
business_units.description: Remaining Sears and Kmart brick-and-mortar stores
business_units.trend: Sears stores declined 70% since FY22; Kmart more stable

business_units.name: HTS
business_units.description: Last-mile logistics, delivery, and installation of large appliances
business_units.status: IN BANKRUPTCY - Reed Smith managing proceedings
business_units.legal_status_note: Unlikely to settle per legal sheet commentary
business_units.risk: HTS bankruptcy threatens ongoing logistics capabilities and Costco relationship

business_units.name: SYW
business_units.description: Loyalty program platform with Citi credit card partnership
business_units.status: Strategic pivot - new credit card program launching
business_units.new_card_program: Launched FY26; Wachtell legal fees $1.2M for launch
business_units.upside: If new card program approaches historical CITI levels, could add $25M-$50M/year in inflows

business_units.name: Supply Chain
business_units.description: Distribution center network serving Retail and Home Services

business_units.name: Real Estate
business_units.description: Legacy Sears/Kmart real estate portfolio — owned properties, subleases, lease terminations
business_units.asset_sales_acceleration: Jan 2026 BOD focused on asset monetization

debt_structure.note: 2022 structure from analysis_2022.json column labels; FY25-26 from Liquidity sheet

interest_expense_trend.change: 331% increase — likely PIK converting to cash-pay or new debt added

matters.commentary: Ongoing legal work; unlikely to settle
matters.strategic_significance: HIGH - threatens HTS operations and Costco relationship
CRITICAL - threatens KCD brand licensing, Transform's highest growth asset

matters.commentary: Highest RE legal spend. Bloomington MN (Mall of America area). SRZ Liquidating Trust payment $2.05M in FY25.

matters.matter: Benderson Case (Midland MI and Oakdale CA)
matters.commentary: Going to trial. Settlement if reached would be upwards of $1.2M. Estimate $1.5M for 2026.
Numerous cases filed by LL. FY25 spend $840K; estimate $1M FY26.

key_facts: Available cash just $9.9M vs $218.5M unavailable/trapped
Active equity PPM offerings ($140M June, $120M August 2022)
11 tranches of term loan principal active simultaneously
Asset Sales proceeds earmarked at $250M balance
43 worksheet model; full operational breadth including Monark, DAEWOO, Innovel

strategic_inflection_points.event: First explicit liquidity crisis: DecBOD labeled 'liquidity update final'
key_facts: Cyrus $55M Term Loan drawn for first time
RE & Debt initiatives sheet tab added
Available cash deceptively elevated (holiday drawdown)
Two weeks later cash fell to $6.3M with -$13.74M weekly NCF
File explicitly labeled 'Use for FY23a'; companion file 'Do Not Use for FY23'
Bohemia property cash flows reclassified
Likely improved operating vs financing presentation
Pattern of recurring BOD liquidity interventions in 1H FY23
May 2023 also includes 'Liquidity & May actuals' label
First file explicitly tagged with next fiscal year
Model has evolved to 'deck version' format for BOD presentation
July 2025 file is 'condensed' — model streamlined over time

strategic_inflection_points.event: Asset monetization focus: 'asset sales_JanBOD' and 'new format'
key_facts: First BOD file explicitly tagged 'asset sales'
New presentation format introduced
Signals Board-level focus on accelerating property and asset monetization
Three file versions: working, deck version, MarBOD — iterative restructuring process
FY26 operating deficit target: ~$83.7M vs FY25 actual $153.2M (-$70M improvement)
Supply Chain inflows cut nearly in half YOY
SC payroll reduced $2.8M in 2H FY26
FY27 working version already being built concurrently (02.27.26 file)

key_items.item: Sunny Isle Developers LLC legal settlement
Collateral net (LOC reductions, AIG loss sensitive)
